rules.rule: every publication assembly MUST cite composition_id, all page_layout_ids in order, and a sha256 of the deterministic assembly manifest.
assembly is permitted only when composition is reviewer-approved AND continuity check passed AND responsive parity verified.
assembly MUST NOT mutate the live publication tree, layer-42 visual-publication-builds tree, or layer-43 visual-generation-runtime tree.
assemblies are append-only; replacement requires explicit publication-structure-supersedence.
rollback restores by appending a reverse assembly event referencing the prior assembly_id.
the assembly manifest MUST embed sha256 of every page_layout and section_composition for replay verification.
